scope: Degradation visuals may only affect the part of the image that is present: mining cracks on a thin tree trunk must not draw outside the trunk bar, and the rule must hold for everything that degrades.
summary: world.block_opaque_mask(block_id): cached BitMap built from the same tile texture the tileset renders (art or generated fallback, alpha threshold 0.1; null for air/unknown ids). The FQ-08 crack overlay in player._draw keeps the identical hash(mine_target) seed and randf sequence — per-cell crack layouts remain deterministic — but each segment is now rasterized in 1px steps and drawn only where the mask is opaque. Result: tree_trunk (6px bar), tree_leaves (clipped corners), berry_bush, torch, and lantern crack only on visible pixels; fully-opaque solid tiles keep their layout (rendered as crisp pixels instead of anti-aliased lines). Audit of remaining degradation visuals found them already sprite-bounded: the Town Hall damage overlay exactly covers its drawn wall rect, and enemy hurt feedback tints the sprite/fallback shape itself.
acceptance: Cracks cannot render outside a sprite's opaque pixels: masked rasterization in player._draw; smoke pins the mask semantics (fq08_crack_mask_inside_sprite: stone opaque at corner+center, tree_trunk opaque at bar center, transparent at both tile edges, air null)
Crack determinism preserved: same per-cell seed and RNG call sequence as FQ-08
All prior behavior untouched: mining frames, drops, saves, damage stages (fq08_* checks all green)
Smoke 184/184 PASS at 2026-07-09T15:07:39 on waited windowed Godot 4.6.1; validator PASS; capsule doctor healthy; git diff --check clean
validation: COHERONIA_SMOKE=1 waited windowed run -> 184/184 PASS incl. new fq08_crack_mask_inside_sprite
decisions: Mask lives on world (block_opaque_mask) beside the texture builder so art and fallback paths share one source of truth; cached per block id with tileset-equivalent staleness (no hot-reload, matching FQ-07 behavior)
Cracks rasterize per pixel through the mask instead of clipping line endpoints — a clipped line could still cross transparent pixels mid-segment
RNG seed and call sequence intentionally unchanged so existing crack layouts stay deterministic per cell
Town Hall and enemy degradation visuals audited and left alone: both already draw within their sprite/shape bounds
Incident recorded: a PowerShell bulk-replace double-encoded README.md's UTF-8 mid-run; restored from HEAD and re-edited with exact-string edits; committed file verified clean
risks: Masks cache on first use and do not hot-reload late-arriving art (same rule as the tileset); re-entering the world refreshes both
Solid-block cracks render as 1px pixels rather than 1.2px anti-aliased lines — slightly crisper 8-16bit look, intentional
next_action: FQ-09S: skill tree visual treatment pass.
